name: COGAN SYNDROME
definition: AUTOIMMUNE INTERSTITIAL KERATITIS rare autoimmune multisystem disease characterized by nonsyphilitic interstitial keratitis +
distribution: necrotizing vasculitis → coronary / iliac / renal artery stenosis
discriminating_features: necrotizing vasculitis → coronary / iliac / renal artery stenosis
ischemic change or infarction, meningoencephalitis, cerebral venous sinus thrombosis,

general: necrotizing vasculitis → coronary / iliac / renal artery stenosis
CNS: ischemic change or infarction, meningoencephalitis, cerebral venous sinus thrombosis,
